title: Crumbly Crayfish Jerk
description: An earthy and crumbly Ukrainian dish featuring a savory blend of jerk seasoning combined with crispy plant-based elements.
instructions: Mix jerk seasoning with mayonnaise in a bowl.
In a separate pan, heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add tomatoes to the pan and cook until soft, about 5 minutes.
Fold in the seasoned mayonnaise mixture and simmer for another minute.
Combine breadcrumbs with garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Press half of the breadcrumb mixture onto the tomato mixture to create a crust.
Sprinkle remaining breadcrumb mixture evenly over the top.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the top.
Let cool slightly before serving with fresh herbs if desired.
